hero.headline: County by county
hero.description: A prophetic visitation — 46 counties, one mandate. Finding the gatekeeper of each territory, releasing a word, and leaving the county carrying what God released.

mandate.headline: This is not a conference.
mandate.body: Unite South Carolina is a prophetic assignment given to Reuben and Grace Kora — to travel county by county across all 46 counties of South Carolina, find the gatekeeper of each area, and minister as a traveling prophetic voice into that territory. The assignment is simple: go. Find the one who holds the gate. Be received. Let God move.
mandate.pull_quote: The goal is not 46 events. The goal is 46 counties that have been visited, spoken over, and released into their assignment.
mandate.model_body: Jesus sent His disciples two by two — no bag, no elaborate plan. They went. They found the person of peace. They stayed. They ministered. They moved on.

contrasts.is: A prophetic visitation — county by county
A mandate to be carried and released
Finding those already holding the gate
About territory and the body of Christ in SC

prayer.headline: This is a prayer assignment
prayer.body: Every county must be prayed over before arrival. Thirty days of targeted intercession precedes each visit — the prophetic visitation is the harvest of prayer. The ground is prepared in the spirit before the word lands in the natural.
prayer.intercession_body: A small team of 3–7 trusted intercessors covers the entire journey — praying over each county during the 30-day cycle, covering travel protection, and praying in real time during each visit.
prayer_items: The spiritual history of the county — what has been established and what needs to be broken
The gatekeeper — their readiness, protection, and openness to receive
The people who will be in the room — that the right ones will be gathered
The word God wants to release — that it would be clear before you arrive
The territory itself — declaration of God's purposes over the land
left_behind_items: A spoken word over the county — on record if the host chooses
A prophetic release over the gatekeeper and key leaders
A county declaration — written or spoken
Prayer covering — intercession continues after departure

support.headline: Every county visited
support.body: This mandate moves by faith and by the generosity of those who believe in what God is doing across South Carolina. Your support covers travel, accommodation, and the costs of each county visit.

footer.tagline: 46 counties. Two sent ones. One mandate.

scriptures.verse: "How beautiful are the feet of those who bring good news."
"I will give you every place where you set your foot."
"Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity! For there the LORD commanded the blessing — life forevermore."
